content:
Stories (continued) — HRREC-82977

StoryGap score (%)PM lensQA lensXO lensVerdictSuggested missing BDD (Given/When/Then)

HRREC-91994
PH: Send Message (No Attachments)

38% — PM slice value clear; QA tenant limits; XO catalog present but per-hook proof still SUV work.

  • Jira — PH: Send Message (No Attachments): confirm acceptance scenarios still match recruiter language after recent edits.
  • Salomon — Agency / UDMF: duplicate agency submissions depend on BP CRF vs UDMF-aware rule; isolation tests need explicit internal vs agency accounts.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91994 (PH: Send Message (No Attachments)): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • Functional knowledge — Consent and audit expectations for candidate-visible email still apply—tie any new surface to comms policy review.
  • Jira — Exercise negatives implied by PH: Send Message (No Attachments): record tenant SKU (SSP growth) and mail lane used.
  • Salomon — Attachment and size limits differ by channel—log count, MiB, and virus-scan rejection separately in defects.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91994 (PH: Send Message (No Attachments)): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • XO MCP — row focus HRREC-91994: PH: Send Message (No Attachments) — map SUV bindings for this slice; Tier B catalog search only (no per-hook proof in this pass).
  • XO MCP — searched Recruiting Email PRU/PU paths (Candidate Email create, External/Internal candidate parms) for send/receive wiring.
  • XO MCP — risk: Tier B pass did not hop bindings per story—confirm REST contract and notification types on SUV for this slice.
  • Finding: HRREC-91994 — Tenant mail setup and template health still dominate false defects next to UI polish for this slice.
  • Recommended next step: Document tenant limits (attachment size, recipient count) beside UI acceptance text.

Scenario: REST parity spot-check (key-specific)
Given tenant staged for HRREC-91994 with logged mail mode
When the recruiter performs the behaviour described in: Send Message (No Attachments)
Then UI, persisted thread state, and captured network payloads align for this slice

HRREC-91995
PH: Recruiter gets discard popup by changing pages

38% — PM slice value clear; QA tenant limits; XO catalog present but per-hook proof still SUV work.

  • Jira — PH: Recruiter gets discard popup by changing pages: confirm acceptance scenarios still match recruiter language after recent edits.
  • Salomon — Recruiting Communications / tenant templates: blank-body risk when subject or body missing or template overrides recruiter draft (internal precedent on grid sends).
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91995 (PH: Recruiter gets discard popup by changing pages): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • Functional knowledge — Consent and audit expectations for candidate-visible email still apply—tie any new surface to comms policy review.
  • Jira — Discard paths: slow-double-click, Escape parity, and in-flight REST while dialog open—Message Builder notes no server draft persistence.
  • Salomon — Email Analytics may reject empty subject lines—pair blank-body template issues with vendor status rows when reproducing.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91995 (PH: Recruiter gets discard popup by changing pages): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • XO MCP — row focus HRREC-91995: PH: Recruiter gets discard popup by changing pages — map SUV bindings for this slice; Tier B catalog search only (no per-hook proof in this pass).
  • XO MCP — searched cl: Conversation (and related conversational UI classes) as anchor for thread container work.
  • XO MCP — risk: validate which XO class owns the recruiter-visible field you are changing—avoid fixing the wrong layer.
  • Finding: HRREC-91995 — Slice looks UI-led in Jira; backend touchpoints (notifications, persistence) need one SUV confirmation pass.
  • Recommended next step: Log Default SMTP vs override and Recruiting Communications template state in each defect.

Scenario: REST parity spot-check (key-specific)
Given tenant staged for HRREC-91995 with logged mail mode
When the recruiter performs the behaviour described in: Recruiter gets discard popup by changing pages
Then UI, persisted thread state, and captured network payloads align for this slice

HRREC-91996
PH: Recruiter gets discard popup when they click the Discard button

38% — PM slice value clear; QA tenant limits; XO catalog present but per-hook proof still SUV work.

  • Jira — PH: Recruiter gets discard popup when they click the Discard button: confirm acceptance scenarios still match recruiter language after recent edits.
  • Salomon — Purge: Recruiting Communications PDT removes conversation messages, participants, recruiting email attachments, notification events—align recruiter-visible UI after purge with privacy comms.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91996 (PH: Recruiter gets discard popup when they click th…): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • Functional knowledge — Consent and audit expectations for candidate-visible email still apply—tie any new surface to comms policy review.
  • Jira — Discard paths: slow-double-click, Escape parity, and in-flight REST while dialog open—Message Builder notes no server draft persistence.
  • Salomon — Email Analytics may reject empty subject lines—pair blank-body template issues with vendor status rows when reproducing.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91996 (PH: Recruiter gets discard popup when they click th…): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • XO MCP — row focus HRREC-91996: PH: Recruiter gets discard popup when they click the Discard button — map SUV bindings for this slice; Tier B catalog search only (no per-hook proof in this pass).
  • XO MCP — searched cl: Conversation Message (+ Derived, Status, Sender) for delivery tags, read/unread, purge visibility.
  • XO MCP — risk: validate which XO class owns the recruiter-visible field you are changing—avoid fixing the wrong layer.
  • Finding: HRREC-91996 — Slice looks UI-led in Jira; backend touchpoints (notifications, persistence) need one SUV confirmation pass.
  • Recommended next step: Document tenant limits (attachment size, recipient count) beside UI acceptance text.

When the recruiter performs the behaviour described in: Recruiter gets discard popup when they click the Discard button

HRREC-91997
PH: Recruiter sees list of messages with unread ones marked in blue

38% — PM slice value clear; QA tenant limits; XO catalog present but per-hook proof still SUV work.

  • Jira — PH: Recruiter sees list of messages with unread ones marked in blue: confirm acceptance scenarios still match recruiter language after recent edits.
  • Salomon — Agency / UDMF: duplicate agency submissions depend on BP CRF vs UDMF-aware rule; isolation tests need explicit internal vs agency accounts.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91997 (PH: Recruiter sees list of messages with unread one…): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • Functional knowledge — Consent and audit expectations for candidate-visible email still apply—tie any new surface to comms policy review.
  • Jira — Decide per-user vs shared read model, then test multi-recruiter refresh and non-colour unread cue per Scenario 3.
  • Salomon — Email Analytics may reject empty subject lines—pair blank-body template issues with vendor status rows when reproducing.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91997 (PH: Recruiter sees list of messages with unread one…): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • XO MCP — row focus HRREC-91997: PH: Recruiter sees list of messages with unread ones marked in blue — map SUV bindings for this slice; Tier B catalog search only (no per-hook proof in this pass).
  • XO MCP — searched Recruiting Email PRU/PU paths (Candidate Email create, External/Internal candidate parms) for send/receive wiring.
  • XO MCP — risk: vendor mail rejections may surface as generic errors—pair UI copy with vendor status rows.
  • Finding: HRREC-91997 — Edge cases (slow network, double submit) are implied more than written—false-positive bug risk until spelled out.
  • Recommended next step: Attach the exact mail mode and template name used when the behaviour reproduces (or fails).
